title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 06 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 06 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 06 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/02/2024
DCE iron ore futures continued to ﬂuctuate in a day by 0.63%. As the Spring Festival approaches, coupled withweak market perfor- mance, the enthusiasm of traders to oﬀer is poor. However, steel mills mainly rely on observation and have not yet learned about market transactions.
